reviews.review_msg: Took course due to interest in the topic of Chinese Development and learned lots of new information. Lectures weren't actually boring compared to some other profs. Definitely a ton of writing in this course and I'm not a good writer. Marking feedback was concise and didn't mention how to improve. Not the prof for me but take the advice others gave.

While she delivers decent lectures, the biggest problem with this professor is her poor attitude that makes it difficult you to approach her for help. Never experienced this with other IS professors. Combined with her tough grading, you'll be in for a depressing ride.
